attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
 
EX.CDB_DEQUEUE_TIME,
EX.CREATION_DATE,
EX.DEBIT_CREDIT_CODE,
EX.ETL_PROCESS_DTM,
EX.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
EX.LATEST_SC_FLAG,
EX.SOURCE_TRX_ID,
EX.OTM_TERR_ID,
EX.OTM_TERR_NAME,
EX.OTM_TERR_TYPE_CODE,
EX.REBOK_CHANNEL_FLAG,
EX.SALESREP_NUMBER,
EX.SC_ASSIGNMENT_MODE_CODE,
EX.SC_LAST_UPD_DATE,
EX.SC_REASON_CODE,
EX.SC_SPLIT_PERCENT,
EX.SC_TYPE_CODE,
EX.SC_UNALLOCATED,
EX.SC_USAGE_CODE,
EX.SHR_NODE_ID,
EX.TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE,
EX.TRX_SPLIT_SC_ID,
EX.USER_NAME,
EX.UCRM_CASE_NUM,
EX.TRX_SPLIT_BU_KEY,
EX.TRX_SPLIT_ID,
EX.SPLIT_1_BU_KEY,
EX.SPLIT_1_PERCENTAGE,
EX.SPLIT_2_BU_KEY,
EX.SPLIT_2_PERCENTAGE,
EX.TOTAL_SPLIT,
EX.SPLIT_2_TYPE

 FROM                    
 $$EXCEPDB.EX_OTM_SLS_CRDTS_RTE_TRX_OLY_RTNR EX
 WHERE NOT EXISTS
 (
 SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_OTM_SLS_CRDT_RTE_TRX_OLY_RTNR STG
 WHERE EX.TRX_SPLIT_SC_ID=STG.TRX_SPLIT_SC_ID)
 AND  EX.TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE<>'DR'

SELECT 
SM.SALES_CREDIT_ASSGN_RTE_OLY_KEY,
STG.TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE AS BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD,
--NSTT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
COALESCE(NSTT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,73106) SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
STG.SALESREP_NUMBER AS SALES_REP_NUMBER,
STG.SC_TYPE_CODE AS SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD,
STG.SOURCE_TRX_ID AS EP_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
(STG.SC_SPLIT_PERCENT*100)     AS SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,
STG.CREATION_DATE AS SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM,
STG.CREATION_DATE AS DV_SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DT,
'O' AS SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD,
STG.SC_LAST_UPD_DATE  AS SCA_SOURCE_UPDATE_DTM,   
STG.SC_LAST_UPD_DATE  AS DV_SCA_SOURCE_UPDATE_DT,   
STG.SOURCE_TRX_ID AS SK_LINE_ID_INT,
STG.TRX_SPLIT_SC_ID AS SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT, 
NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE AS SS_CD,
COALESCE(STG.SPLIT_1_PERCENTAGE  ,1.000000)          AS SPLIT_1_OFFR_ATTRBTN_PCT,
COALESCE(STG.SPLIT_2_PERCENTAGE  ,1.000000)          AS SPLIT_2_OFFR_ATTRBTN_PCT,
COALESCE((STG.SC_SPLIT_PERCENT * STG.TOTAL_SPLIT  ),1.000000)   AS TOTAL_SPLIT_PCT ,
CASE WHEN STG.SPLIT_2_TYPE ='SQ' THEN SQA.SALES_MOTION_CD  ELSE COALESCE (RTR.SALES_MOTION_CD,'UNKNOWN') END SALES_MOTION_CD,  
  COALESCE(STG.SPLIT_2_TYPE, 'UNKNOWN' ) SPLIT_2_TYPE_CD,
STG.TRX_SPLIT_SC_ID AS SK_TRX_SPLIT_ID_INT ,
'UNKNOWN'  AS RTNR_UNIQUE_ID,
STG.TRX_SPLIT_BU_KEY AS BK_TRANSACTION_SPLIT_BU_ID,  
 COALESCE(STG.SPLIT_1_BU_KEY    ,-9999) AS BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
CASE WHEN STG.SPLIT_2_TYPE ='SQ' THEN SQA.SK_SQ_SOL_ALLOC_KEY ELSE COALESCE( RTR.ATTR_PRDT_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_KEY, -999 ) END SK_RTNR_ATTRIBUTION_KEY_INT ,
STG.TRX_SPLIT_SC_ID AS EP_TRX_SPLIT_SC_ID_INT,

 cast(STG.CREATION_DATE AS  TIMESTAMP(0)) AS START_TV_DTM, 
 (CASE
WHEN STG.LATEST_SC_FLAG='N' AND STG.CREATION_DATE<>STG.LAST_UPDATE_DATE THEN COALESCE((STG.LAST_UPDATE_DATE- INTERVAL '1' SECOND),
CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))
WHEN STG.LATEST_SC_FLAG='N' AND STG.CREATION_DATE=STG.LAST_UPDATE_DATE THEN COALESCE(STG.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))
WHEN STG.LATEST_SC_FLAG='Y' AND STG.DEBIT_CREDIT_CODE='DEBIT' 
 THEN COALESCE((STG.LAST_UPDATE_DATE- INTERVAL '1' SECOND),CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))
WHEN STG.LATEST_SC_FLAG='Y' THEN CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0) )
END)  AS END_TV_DTM,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS  EDW_CREATE_DTM,
  USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS  EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS  EDW_UPDATE_USER,
--'I' AS ACTION_CODE, 
STG.LATEST_SC_FLAG AS ACTION_CODE ,
  CASE WHEN STG.DEBIT_CREDIT_CODE='CREDIT' THEN 'I' WHEN STG.DEBIT_CREDIT_CODE='DEBIT' THEN 'U' END AS DML_TYPE
FROM
(SELECT SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE FROM 
  $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES WHERE GLOBAL_NAME = 'CG') NSSC,
$$STGDB.ST_OTM_SLS_CRDT_RTE_TRX_OLY_RTNR STG 
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SCA_RTE_OLY_RTNR SM
  ON STG.TRX_SPLIT_SC_ID=SM.EP_TRX_SPLIT_SC_ID_INT        
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_SALES_REP_TV NESR
ON TRIM( LEADING '0' FROM STG.SALESREP_NUMBER)=  TRIM( LEADING '0' FROM COALESCE(NESR.SALES_REP_NUMBER,CAST('99998' AS VARCHAR(30))))
   AND NESR.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
   
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_TERRITORY_TV NSTT
   ON STG.SHR_NODE_ID=NSTT.SHARE_NODE_ID_INT AND NSTT.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01' 

LEFT JOIN   (SELECT * FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_SUMMARY_QUOTE_SOL_ALLOC SQA 
   QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY SQA.SK_SQ_SOL_ALLOC_KEY ORDER BY EDW_UPDATE_DTM DESC ) =1) SQA   
   ON SQA.SK_SQ_SOL_ALLOC_KEY = STG.SPLIT_2_BU_KEY 
   
 LEFT JOIN ( SEL * FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_ATTR_PRDT_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_NRT_TV RTR
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY RTR.SK_RTR_ATTRIBUTION_ID ORDER BY EDW_UPDATE_DTM DESC ) =1) RTR
  ON  STG.SPLIT_2_BU_KEY=RTR.SK_RTR_ATTRIBUTION_ID  
 WHERE STG.TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE <>'DR'

SELECT
 
STG.CDB_DEQUEUE_TIME,
STG.CREATION_DATE,
STG.DEBIT_CREDIT_CODE,
STG.ETL_PROCESS_DTM,
'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE,
STG.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
STG.LATEST_SC_FLAG,
STG.SOURCE_TRX_ID,
STG.OTM_TERR_ID,
STG.OTM_TERR_NAME,
STG.OTM_TERR_TYPE_CODE,
STG.REBOK_CHANNEL_FLAG,
STG.SALESREP_NUMBER,
STG.SC_ASSIGNMENT_MODE_CODE,
STG.SC_LAST_UPD_DATE,
STG.SC_REASON_CODE,
STG.SC_SPLIT_PERCENT,
STG.SC_TYPE_CODE,
STG.SC_UNALLOCATED,
STG.SC_USAGE_CODE,
STG.SHR_NODE_ID,
STG.TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE,
STG.TRX_SPLIT_SC_ID,
STG.USER_NAME,
STG.UCRM_CASE_NUM,
STG.TRX_SPLIT_BU_KEY,
STG.TRX_SPLIT_ID,
STG.SPLIT_1_BU_KEY,
STG.SPLIT_1_PERCENTAGE,
STG.SPLIT_2_BU_KEY,
STG.SPLIT_2_PERCENTAGE,
STG.TOTAL_SPLIT,
STG.SPLIT_2_TYPE

 FROM                    
 $$STGDB.ST_OTM_SLS_CRDT_RTE_TRX_OLY_RTNR STG
 WHERE NOT EXISTS
 (
 SELECT 1 FROM $$WORKDB.W_SCA_RTE_TRX_OLY_RTNR  WSAT
 WHERE WSAT.EP_TRX_SPLIT_SC_ID_INT=STG.TRX_SPLIT_SC_ID)
 AND STG.TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE<>'DR'
